zh.label: 最新版本
zh.title: Developer ID 签名与 Apple 公证
changes: 应用及其 Sparkle 嵌套组件使用 Developer ID Application 签名
应用、Sparkle 更新 ZIP 和手动安装 DMG 均已通过 Apple 公证
新增 DMG 手动安装包，同时保留应用内更新所需的 ZIP 和 appcast

en.label: Latest
en.title: Developer ID signing and Apple notarization
changes: The app and its nested Sparkle components are signed with Developer ID Application.
The app, Sparkle update ZIP, and manual-install DMG have passed Apple notarization.
A DMG is now available for manual installation, while the ZIP and appcast remain available for in-app updates.
